metadata.name: employee
metadata.comment: Employee information such as salary, department, and title.

businessentityid.name: businessentityid
businessentityid.comment: Primary key for Employee records.  Foreign key to BusinessEntity.BusinessEntityID.

nationalidnumber.name: nationalidnumber
nationalidnumber.comment: Unique national identification number such as a social security number.

jobtitle.name: jobtitle
jobtitle.comment: Work title such as Buyer or Sales Representative.

salariedflag.name: salariedflag
salariedflag.comment: Job classification. 0 = Hourly, not exempt from collective bargaining. 1 = Salaried, exempt from collective bargaining.

sickleavehours.name: sickleavehours
sickleavehours.comment: Number of available sick leave hours.

organizationnode.name: organizationnode
organizationnode.comment: Where the employee is located in corporate hierarchy.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: person
metadata.comment: Human beings involved with AdventureWorks: employees, customer contacts, and vendor contacts.

persontype.name: persontype
persontype.comment: Primary type of person: SC = Store Contact, IN = Individual (retail) customer, SP = Sales person, EM = Employee (non-sales), VC = Vendor contact, GC = General contact

namestyle.name: namestyle
namestyle.comment: 0 = The data in FirstName and LastName are stored in western style (first name, last name) order.  1 = Eastern style (last name, first name) order.

title.name: title
title.comment: A courtesy title. For example, Mr. or Ms.

middlename.name: middlename
middlename.comment: Middle name or middle initial of the person.

suffix.name: suffix
suffix.comment: Surname suffix. For example, Sr. or Jr.

emailpromotion.name: emailpromotion
emailpromotion.comment: 0 = Contact does not wish to receive e-mail promotions, 1 = Contact does wish to receive e-mail promotions from AdventureWorks, 2 = Contact does wish to receive e-mail promotions from AdventureWorks and selected partners.

additionalcontactinfo.name: additionalcontactinfo
additionalcontactinfo.comment: Additional contact information about the person stored in xml format.

demographics.name: demographics
demographics.comment: Personal information such as hobbies, and income collected from online shoppers. Used for sales analysis.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: product
metadata.comment: Products sold or used in the manfacturing of sold products.

makeflag.name: makeflag
makeflag.comment: 0 = Product is purchased, 1 = Product is manufactured in-house.

finishedgoodsflag.name: finishedgoodsflag
finishedgoodsflag.comment: 0 = Product is not a salable item. 1 = Product is salable.

reorderpoint.name: reorderpoint
reorderpoint.comment: Inventory level that triggers a purchase order or work order.

sizeunitmeasurecode.name: sizeunitmeasurecode
sizeunitmeasurecode.comment: Unit of measure for Size column.

weightunitmeasurecode.name: weightunitmeasurecode
weightunitmeasurecode.comment: Unit of measure for Weight column.

daystomanufacture.name: daystomanufacture
daystomanufacture.comment: Number of days required to manufacture the product.

productline.name: productline
productline.comment: R = Road, M = Mountain, T = Touring, S = Standard

class.name: class
class.comment: H = High, M = Medium, L = Low

style.name: style
style.comment: W = Womens, M = Mens, U = Universal

productsubcategoryid.name: productsubcategoryid
productsubcategoryid.comment: Product is a member of this product subcategory. Foreign key to ProductSubCategory.ProductSubCategoryID.

productmodelid.name: productmodelid
productmodelid.comment: Product is a member of this product model. Foreign key to ProductModel.ProductModelID.

sellstartdate.name: sellstartdate
sellstartdate.comment: Date the product was available for sale.

sellenddate.name: sellenddate
sellenddate.comment: Date the product was no longer available for sale.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

productcategoryid.name: productcategoryid
productcategoryid.comment: Product category identification number. Foreign key to ProductCategory.ProductCategoryID.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: purchaseorderdetail
metadata.comment: Individual products associated with a specific purchase order. See PurchaseOrderHeader.

purchaseorderid.name: purchaseorderid
purchaseorderid.comment: Primary key. Foreign key to PurchaseOrderHeader.PurchaseOrderID.

purchaseorderdetailid.name: purchaseorderdetailid
purchaseorderdetailid.comment: Primary key. One line number per purchased product.

duedate.name: duedate
duedate.comment: Date the product is expected to be received.

productid.name: productid
productid.comment: Product identification number. Foreign key to Product.ProductID.

unitprice.name: unitprice
unitprice.comment: Vendor's selling price of a single product.

receivedqty.name: receivedqty
receivedqty.comment: Quantity actually received from the vendor.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: purchaseorderheader
metadata.comment: General purchase order information. See PurchaseOrderDetail.

revisionnumber.name: revisionnumber
revisionnumber.comment: Incremental number to track changes to the purchase order over time.

status.name: status
status.comment: Order current status. 1 = Pending; 2 = Approved; 3 = Rejected; 4 = Complete

employeeid.name: employeeid
employeeid.comment: Employee who created the purchase order. Foreign key to Employee.BusinessEntityID.

vendorid.name: vendorid
vendorid.comment: Vendor with whom the purchase order is placed. Foreign key to Vendor.BusinessEntityID.

shipmethodid.name: shipmethodid
shipmethodid.comment: Shipping method. Foreign key to ShipMethod.ShipMethodID.

shipdate.name: shipdate
shipdate.comment: Estimated shipment date from the vendor.

subtotal.name: subtotal
subtotal.comment: Purchase order subtotal. Computed as SUM(PurchaseOrderDetail.LineTotal)for the appropriate PurchaseOrderID.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: vendor
metadata.comment: Companies from whom Adventure Works Cycles purchases parts or other goods.

businessentityid.name: businessentityid
businessentityid.comment: Primary key for Vendor records.  Foreign key to BusinessEntity.BusinessEntityID

creditrating.name: creditrating
creditrating.comment: 1 = Superior, 2 = Excellent, 3 = Above average, 4 = Average, 5 = Below average

preferredvendorstatus.name: preferredvendorstatus
preferredvendorstatus.comment: 0 = Do not use if another vendor is available. 1 = Preferred over other vendors supplying the same product.

activeflag.name: activeflag
activeflag.comment: 0 = Vendor no longer used. 1 = Vendor is actively used.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: customer
metadata.comment: Current customer information. Also see the Person and Store tables.

territoryid.name: territoryid
territoryid.comment: ID of the territory in which the customer is located. Foreign key to SalesTerritory.SalesTerritoryID.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: salesorderdetail
metadata.comment: Individual products associated with a specific sales order. See SalesOrderHeader.

salesorderid.name: salesorderid
salesorderid.comment: Primary key. Foreign key to SalesOrderHeader.SalesOrderID.

salesorderdetailid.name: salesorderdetailid
salesorderdetailid.comment: Primary key. One incremental unique number per product sold.

carriertrackingnumber.name: carriertrackingnumber
carriertrackingnumber.comment: Shipment tracking number supplied by the shipper.

productid.name: productid
productid.comment: Product sold to customer. Foreign key to Product.ProductID.

specialofferid.name: specialofferid
specialofferid.comment: Promotional code. Foreign key to SpecialOffer.SpecialOfferID.

unitprice.name: unitprice
unitprice.comment: Selling price of a single product.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

revisionnumber.name: revisionnumber
revisionnumber.comment: Incremental number to track changes to the sales order over time.

orderdate.name: orderdate
orderdate.comment: Dates the sales order was created.

duedate.name: duedate
duedate.comment: Date the order is due to the customer.

shipdate.name: shipdate
shipdate.comment: Date the order was shipped to the customer.

status.name: status
status.comment: Order current status. 1 = In process; 2 = Approved; 3 = Backordered; 4 = Rejected; 5 = Shipped; 6 = Cancelled

onlineorderflag.name: onlineorderflag
onlineorderflag.comment: 0 = Order placed by sales person. 1 = Order placed online by customer.

customerid.name: customerid
customerid.comment: Customer identification number. Foreign key to Customer.BusinessEntityID.

salespersonid.name: salespersonid
salespersonid.comment: Sales person who created the sales order. Foreign key to SalesPerson.BusinessEntityID.

territoryid.name: territoryid
territoryid.comment: Territory in which the sale was made. Foreign key to SalesTerritory.SalesTerritoryID.

billtoaddressid.name: billtoaddressid
billtoaddressid.comment: Customer billing address. Foreign key to Address.AddressID.

shiptoaddressid.name: shiptoaddressid
shiptoaddressid.comment: Customer shipping address. Foreign key to Address.AddressID.

shipmethodid.name: shipmethodid
shipmethodid.comment: Shipping method. Foreign key to ShipMethod.ShipMethodID.

creditcardid.name: creditcardid
creditcardid.comment: Credit card identification number. Foreign key to CreditCard.CreditCardID.

creditcardapprovalcode.name: creditcardapprovalcode
creditcardapprovalcode.comment: Approval code provided by the credit card company.

currencyrateid.name: currencyrateid
currencyrateid.comment: Currency exchange rate used. Foreign key to CurrencyRate.CurrencyRateID.

subtotal.name: subtotal
subtotal.comment: Sales subtotal. Computed as SUM(SalesOrderDetail.LineTotal)for the appropriate SalesOrderID.

totaldue.name: totaldue
totaldue.comment: Total due from customer. Computed as Subtotal + TaxAmt + Freight.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

countryregioncode.name: countryregioncode
countryregioncode.comment: ISO standard country or region code. Foreign key to CountryRegion.CountryRegionCode.

group.name: group
group.comment: Geographic area to which the sales territory belong.

salesytd.name: salesytd
salesytd.comment: Sales in the territory year to date.

saleslastyear.name: saleslastyear
saleslastyear.comment: Sales in the territory the previous year.

costytd.name: costytd
costytd.comment: Business costs in the territory year to date.

costlastyear.name: costlastyear
costlastyear.comment: Business costs in the territory the previous year.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

businessentityid.name: businessentityid
businessentityid.comment: Primary key. Foreign key to Customer.BusinessEntityID.

salespersonid.name: salespersonid
salespersonid.comment: ID of the sales person assigned to the customer. Foreign key to SalesPerson.BusinessEntityID.

demographics.name: demographics
demographics.comment: Demographic informationg about the store such as the number of employees, annual sales and store type.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table
